AssessmentRecommendations.Title: Linked server functionality is not supported in Azure SQL Database
AssessmentRecommendations.Impact: Linked servers enable the SQL Server Database Engine to execute commands against OLE DB data sources outside of the instance of SQL Server.
AssessmentRecommendations.Recommendation: Azure SQL Database does not support linked server functionality. Remove or redesign linked-server dependencies before migration, or target Azure SQL Managed Instance when that dependency must be preserved.

ImpactedObjects.Name: [dbo].[SampleLinkedServerProc]
ImpactedObjects.ImpactDetail: StoredProcedure [dbo].[SampleLinkedServerProc] has unresolved reference to object [REMOTE-SQL].[SampleOperationalDb].[dbo].[SampleRemoteTable]

AssessmentRecommendations.Title: Cross-database queries are not supported in Azure SQL Database
AssessmentRecommendations.Impact: Databases on this server use cross-database queries, which are not supported in Azure SQL Database.
AssessmentRecommendations.Recommendation: Move dependent data into the target database, use an Azure SQL pattern that supports distributed querying, or migrate to Azure SQL Managed Instance when cross-database behavior must remain.

ImpactedObjects.Name: [dbo].[SampleCrossDatabaseView]
ImpactedObjects.ImpactDetail: View [dbo].[SampleCrossDatabaseView] references object [SampleWarehouse].[dbo].[SampleDimension] in another database.

FeatureParityRecommendations.Title: Linked server functionality is not supported in Azure SQL Database
FeatureParityRecommendations.Impact: Linked server dependencies were detected in the assessed workload.
FeatureParityRecommendations.Recommendation: Replace linked-server dependencies with supported integration patterns, or target Azure SQL Managed Instance when required.

FeatureParityRecommendations.Title: Cross-database queries are not supported in Azure SQL Database
FeatureParityRecommendations.Impact: Cross-database references were detected in the assessed workload.
FeatureParityRecommendations.Recommendation: Consolidate the dependency, use a supported distributed-query pattern, or choose Azure SQL Managed Instance when required.
